uplink.description: App uplink (fPort 3, protocol v0): SML Klax with a historic Wh energy register (current reading 12442000 Wh), battery 100%
uplink._note: Upstream klax-codec.yaml uplinkDecoder example. Upstream emits a serverID block then a historic Wh register with values [12442000,12442000,12442000,12441000]; we map the current (index 0) Wh value to metering.energy.total and header battery (low3 bits = 5, v0 => *10 path gives 100) to batteryPercent.

uplink.description: App uplink (fPort 3, protocol v0): historic block with two registers, Wh energy (5500000 Wh) and VA apparent power (800 VA), battery 80%
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds historic frame. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js: register 1 unit Wh values [5500000,...], register 2 unit VA values [800,...]; battery low nibble 8 on v0 path => 80%. We take each register's index-0 value.

uplink.description: App uplink (fPort 3, protocol v2): 'now' float registers reporting instantaneous voltage 230.5 V, current 1.25 A, active power 287.4 W, frequency 50 Hz
uplink._note: Synthetic v2 'now' frame (4 IEEE-754 float registers, all set+valid). Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js which decodes V=230.5, A=1.25, W=287.3999938964844 (rounds to 287.4 at 3dp), Hz=50; battery low3 bits=5 on v>0 path => *20 => 100%.

uplink.description: App uplink (fPort 3, protocol v2): filter block, single valid IEEE-754 float Wh register (12442.5 Wh)
uplink._note: Synthetic v2 filter frame. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js: filter unit Wh, values[0]={value:12442.5,valid:true}, remaining invalid. We take the first valid float.

uplink.description: App uplink (fPort 3) with only an NDEF (undefined-unit) register: no calibrated measurement -> error
uplink._note: Historic frame whose only active register has unit NDEF with all-zero values; upstream marks it data_valid:false / unit 'NDEF'. No vocabulary key is satisfiable, so we error rather than emit an empty measurement.

uplink.description: Config uplink on fPort 100: not a measurement frame -> error
uplink._note: fPort 100 is the KLAX config uplink (measure interval), not a calibrated meter reading. Only fPort 3 carries telemetry.
